top_signals.title: U.S. confirms second Texas screwworm case, Canada restricts livestock imports
top_signals.summary: New World screwworm larvae feed on the living tissue of warm-blooded animals, creating severe wounds that can be fatal if left untreated.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Speech by Commissioner Šefčovič at the Brussels Economic Security Forum
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 05 Jun 2026 Ladies and gentlemen,
It is a pleasure to return to the Brussels Economic Security Forum, so let me thank the European Policy Centre for the invitation.
